1.0.0.1: Fixed pointer events on tab bar buttons.
Cleaned up redundant grid content pointer-events rule.
1.0.0.2: Improved grid drag handling with document-level events.
Fixed cursor showing grabbing state across the entire page while dragging.
Added interactive element detection to prevent drag conflicts with UI elements.
Improved touch support with touch-action: none.
1.0.1.0: Refactored inline styles into modular CSS and JS files.
Tab bar is now stationary while the grid scrolls beneath it.
Hero section now pans with the grid.
1.0.1.1: Added board system with draggable entries and sections.
Added 'Add' button with dropdown to create entries and sections.
Added coordinate readout pill showing current grid position.
Added radial glow and crosshair marker at grid origin.
1.0.2.0: Added section color picker with preset colors.
Sections are now resizable via drag handles.
New items spawn at the center of the viewport.
1.0.2.1: Sections now drag their contained entries along with them.
1.0.2.3: Refined glow mask to use diameter-based sizing for smoother falloff.
1.0.2.4: Moved coordinate readout to top of screen.
1.0.2.5: Grid glow auto-fades after 1 second of inactivity.
Disabled cursor glow on touch devices.
1.0.2.6: Settings tab now redirects to external JUIL settings page.
1.0.2.7: Touch now shows glow at finger position.
Glow follows finger during touch drag.
1.0.2.8: Added scroll wheel zoom on desktop.
Zoom-aware dragging and resizing of board items.
1.0.3.0: Fixed sections rendering on top of entries while being dragged.
Resize handle glow is now uniform and seamless across edges and corners.
Resize glow appears on section hover instead of individual handle hover.
1.0.3.1: Replaced resize handle glow with cursor-proximity border glow on sections.
Sections are now resizable from all sides and corners.
Border glow follows cursor within a 20px radius, fading to invisible beyond.
1.0.3.2: Fixed grid not showing orb background from JUIL.
1.0.3.3: Orbs now pan with the grid instead of staying viewport-fixed.
New orbs spawn near the user's current viewport position.
1.0.3.4: Fixed grid lines ending when panning far from origin.
Massively expanded grid surface for seamless infinite scrolling.
